name: Breast of Chick. w/ Leeks & Lime on Zucchini "Spahgetti
recipeIngredient: 8 Large Chicken Breasts, halved, skin removed
Salt And Freshly Ground Black Pepper
3 Cups Leeks, Cut Into Thin Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice zucchini lengthwise and cut into spaghetti strips.
2. Pat zucchini "spaghetti" dry and toss with 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
3. Season lightly with salt and pepper and set aside.
4. Lightly flour chicken breasts and shake off excess. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Add 2 tablespoons of olive oil to an oven-proof saute pan and lightly brown on both sides. Remove from pan and set aside.
6. Add remaining oil, leeks, and garlic to the pan and saute over moderate heat for 3-4 minutes or until vegetables are just beginning to soften.
7. Add wine and stock and cook over moderate heat for 3-4 minutes to reduce liquid slightly.
8. Return chicken to the pan and place some of the leek mixture on top of breasts.
9. Season lightly with lime zest, juice, parsley, and sundried tomatoes around breasts.
10. Place the pan in a preheated 400°F oven and bake for 5-7 minutes or until breasts are just done.
11. Halfway through baking the breasts, place zucchini on a separate baking sheet and bake until they just begin to soften.
12. To serve: Arrange zucchini attractively on warm plates and top with breasts and vegetables. Drizzle pan juices over. Garnish with zucchini flowers.
13. Serve hot or at room temperature.
Yield: 8 servings
